overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark rural Russian village at night in a video game. The player approaches a wooden house with a seated figure outside, explores the perimeter witnessing a silhouette in a window, then enters a bar. Atmospheric flashlight illumination with traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown yard between traditional wooden houses

events.description: silhouette appears in the lit window of the house

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right to examine the side of the house, illuminating the fence and overgrown vegetation with a flashlight

notable_agents.action: motionless figure sitting on wooden bench in front of house
silhouette visible inside the house window

entered.detail: traditional Russian wooden house with decorative white window frames and lit windows
weathered green wooden picket fence running along the house perimeter
simple wooden bench positioned in front of the house
tall grass and weeds growing along the fence line

segments.scene_description: The player begins in an overgrown yard at night, illuminating a traditional Russian wooden house with a flashlight. A figure sits motionless on a bench in front of the house. As the camera pans right to explore the perimeter, a silhouette briefly appears in one of the lit windows.

events.description: turns left and begins walking toward the bar entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past the bench toward the bar entrance on the left side of the house

notable_agents.action: seated figure remains motionless on bench as player passes by

entered.detail: hand-painted wooden sign with Cyrillic text 'БАР ЗАПИСЬ' mounted on the fence
small wooden annex building serving as the bar entrance with multiple windows
wooden barrel placed beside the fence near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The player turns left and walks toward a bar entrance, passing the seated figure. A hand-painted Cyrillic sign becomes visible on the fence, and the camera approaches a small wooden annex building that serves as the bar entrance.

events.description: enters the bar building from the outdoor yard

agents.ego_description: stepping into the dimly lit entrance room and approaching the interior blue door

entered.detail: closed blue wooden door with silver handle at the end of the entrance room
coats hanging on wall hooks against the left wall
wooden bench along the right wall inside the entrance
red bulletin board with papers pinned to the wall
single bare light bulb hanging from the ceiling illuminating the room

segments.scene_description: The player enters the bar, transitioning from the dark exterior to a dimly lit wooden vestibule. Inside, a blue door stands at the far end, coats hang on the left wall, and a single exposed bulb provides sparse illumination. The camera approaches the interior door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dark, overgrown yard into the claustrophobic interior of a rural village bar. It begins by illuminating a traditional wooden house with a flashlight, revealing a motionless figure on a bench and a fleeting silhouette in a lit window as the camera pans across the perimeter. As the camera turns left and passes the seated figure, the view shifts toward a hand-painted Cyrillic sign on a fence and approaches a small wooden annex. The scene then transitions from the night air into a dimly lit wooden vestibule, where the darkness gives way to the sparse glow of a single exposed bulb. Finally, the camera moves past coats hanging on the wall toward a blue door at the far end of the interior.
